title: part field of unsigned bigint type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t ( id BIGINT, k INT, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL );
INSERT INTO t (id, k, name) VALUES (5, 1, 'Alice');
INSERT INTO t (id, k, name) VALUES (9223372036854775807, 2, 'Bob');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE id IS NULL OR k > 1;
key_bug_features: Partitioning with unsigned bigint exceeding LLONG_MAX
